title: stelis anolis
intro: Stelis anolis, also known as the hummingbird orchid, is a type of epiphytic orchid native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. It is used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments due to its antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties. The plant's health benefits include its ability to alleviate respiratory issues, reduce fever, and soothe digestive problems, making it a popular remedy among locals. Herbal preparations of Stelis anolis typically involve infusing the plant's leaves in hot water to create a tea, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
